query_title: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World

recommendations.title: The Defiant Ones
recommendations.overview: Two convicts—one white, one black—escape while chained to each other.

recommendations.title: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
recommendations.overview: A couple's attitudes are challenged when their daughter brings home a fiancé who is black.

recommendations.title: On the Beach

recommendations.title: Nebraska
recommendations.overview: An aging, booze-addled father takes a trip from Montana to Nebraska with his estranged son in order to claim what he believes to be a million-dollar sweepstakes prize.

recommendations.title: Watch Out, We're Mad
recommendations.overview: After a tied 1st place in a local stunt race, two drivers start a contest to decide who of them will own the prize, a dune buggy. But when a mobster destroys the car, they are determined to get it back.

recommendations.title: Meet the Robinsons
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Lewis, a brilliant young inventor, is keen on creating a time machine to find his mother, who abandoned him in an orphanage. Things take a turn when he meets Wilbur Robinson and his family.

recommendations.title: Butterflies
recommendations.overview: Three strangers with one thing in common — the same father — come to a Turkish village to bury him, and learn about him and each other.

recommendations.title: Con chi viaggi
recommendations.overview: Four strangers meet through an app to share a car ride that turns into an adventure destined to change the lives of those involved.
